task_completion.description: Verifies the agent logged into OpenSIS as an administrator.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenSIS dashboard or home screen is visible, indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: Verifies the agent navigated to the school management or setup section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A page listing schools or showing school configuration options is visible, and 'Demo School' is present on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verifies the agent opened the configuration form for Demo School.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An editable form containing details specifically for 'Demo School' is displayed.

task_completion.description: Verifies the agent entered the new GPA scale.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The value '5.00' or '5.0' is typed into an input field labeled 'Reporting GP Scale' (or similar).

task_completion.description: Verifies the changes were saved successfully.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message (e.g., 'saved successfully', 'updated') is visible, or the updated value '5.00' is displayed in a non-editable summary or list view.

integrity.description: Verifies the agent used the web browser to interact with OpenSIS.
integrity.visual_evidence: A web browser is used to navigate the OpenSIS interface at http://localhost/opensis/.

integrity.description: Verifies the agent did not use terminal commands or database clients to update the value.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows or database management tools (e.g., mysql CLI, phpMyAdmin) are used to execute SQL queries to update the 'schools' table.

integrity.description: Verifies the agent actually entered the value into the web form.
integrity.visual_evidence: The value '5.00' is seen entered in the appropriate input field in the web form, rather than just in a text editor or script.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target school: 'Demo School'. Initial 'Reporting GP Scale': 4.0. Target 'Reporting GP Scale': 5.0 (or 5.00). The update must be performed via the OpenSIS web interface at http://localhost/opensis/.
